options.label: Default platform
options.help: Which platform the Meeting page opens to. Switching tabs on the panel still works for a one-off call on the other platform; this just sets what shows up by default.

options.label: Use Zoom's default keymappings
options.help: Zoom ships with these combos already bound (Alt+A mute, Alt+V video, Ctrl+Shift+A/D phone accept/decline, Alt+Q leave) — if you haven't changed Zoom's own Keyboard Shortcuts, leave this on and there's nothing to configure. Turn it off only if you've remapped these in Zoom yourself.

options.label: Zoom: Mute/unmute combo
options.help: Zoom default: Alt+A ("Mute/Unmute Audio"). Must match whatever's actually assigned in Zoom → Settings → Keyboard Shortcuts, with "Enable Global Shortcut" checked so it works even when Zoom isn't focused.

options.label: Zoom: Accept inbound call combo
options.help: Zoom default: Ctrl+Shift+A (Zoom Phone's "Accept inbound call").

options.label: Zoom: Decline inbound call combo
options.help: Zoom default: Ctrl+Shift+D (Zoom Phone's "Decline inbound call").

options.label: Zoom: Leave meeting combo
options.help: Zoom default: Alt+Q ("Display prompt to end or leave meeting") — this opens Zoom's leave/end confirmation dialog rather than leaving instantly; you'll still need to confirm it once (in Zoom, via mouse or Enter).

options.label: API key
options.help: In Open WebUI: avatar (bottom-left) → Settings → Account → API Keys → Create new secret key (an admin may need to enable API keys first in Admin Panel → Settings → General → turn Enable API Keys on).

options.label: Dashboard
options.help: url_path of an HA Lovelace dashboard (e.g. 'lovelace' for Overview). Use the picker above to pick one from your HA server.
